creator: dumbbell@FreeBSD.org
text:
The ports failing to build with an error about "__is_convertible" like graphics/darktable seem to hit an incompatibility between GCC 13 and the version of libcxx we have in FreeBSD 12.x:

https://github.com/llvm/llvm-project/commit/484e64f7e7b2c0494d7b2dbfdd528bcd707ee652

https://github.com/llvm/llvm-project/issues/63133

What is the usual course of actions for this situation?

I don't know if this can be worked around at the port level.
